subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth and made them a testimony from His presence unto all who are in the heavens and on earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات بالحق و جعلها حجه من عنده لمن فی السموات و الارضین ان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
